message:
Fix $_ vs $_name variable substitution conflict in REPL

Bug: $_abc was incorrectly parsed as $_ (last selected) + literal "abc"
instead of as the variable named "_abc".

Fix: Only treat $_ as "last selected" when it's standalone - i.e., at
end of string or followed by a non-identifier character (not alphanumeric
or underscore).

Now:
- $_ → last selected result ID
- $_private → variable named "_private"
- $_ foo → last selected + " foo"

Added 3 new tests for underscore variable handling.
All 95 REPL tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
